Details: LawnRX is committed to protecting your privacy. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, and safeguard your information when you use our mobile and web application.
Name and email address provided through Replit authentication (OAuth login).
Lawn images you upload for AI diagnosis. These are processed by OpenAI and not permanently stored on our servers.
Saved lawn diagnosis results including health scores and treatment plans stored in our secure database.
Approximate location (city/region) used to tailor lawn care advice to your climate zone. Precise GPS coordinates are not stored.
Handled entirely by Stripe. Credit card numbers and payment details are not stored on our servers.
Basic app usage information such as number of diagnoses performed used to enforce free-tier limits.
To provide AI-powered lawn diagnosis and personalized treatment plans.
To save and display your diagnosis history.
To manage your subscription and process payments via Stripe.
To send care alerts and seasonal lawn tips relevant to your region.
To improve the accuracy and performance of our AI analysis.
Processes uploaded photos for lawn diagnosis. Subject to OpenAI's Privacy Policy (https://openai.com/policies/privacy-policy).
Handles all payment processing. Subject to Stripe's Privacy Policy (https://stripe.com/privacy).
Provides authentication and hosting infrastructure.
Data is retained for as long as your account is active. Individual plans can be deleted at any time from within the app.
Account and all associated data can be permanently deleted via the profile menu or at lawnrx.replit.app/delete-account. Data is permanently deleted within 90 days of request.
Payment records held by Stripe are subject to Stripe's own data retention policy.
Industry-standard security measures including encrypted connections (HTTPS/TLS), secure session management, and scoped database access.
Data is only accessible to the user when logged in.
LawnRX is not directed at children under 13. Personal information from children under 13 is not knowingly collected.
Users have the right to access and correct personal data at any time.
Users can delete saved plans directly in the app or request full account deletion.
Policy may be updated from time to time. Significant changes will be noted by updating the date at the top of the page. Continued use constitutes acceptance.
https://lawn-rx.replit.app
